reasoning: The 45th Canadian Federal election was held on April 28, 2025. Multiple reports confirm that the Liberal Party, led by Mark Carney, won the popular vote and formed a minority government. Specifically, the Liberals won approximately 43.6% of the popular vote (search_2_result_7) and "were able to win the popular vote, which they have not achieved since 2015" (search_2_result_6). Because the Conservative party did not win the popular vote, they inherently did not win the election by a margin of 0-3%. Consequently, the probability of this market resolving to YES is effectively 0 (submitting the lowest allowed value of 0.02).
